name: Keenness of the Stone Giant
description: Increase your Strength, Constitution, or Wisdom score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You gain darkvision with a range of 60 feet, or increase your existing darkvision range by 60 feet. As a bonus action, you can make a ranged spell attack with a rock (range 60 feet) using the chosen ability score. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage and must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 8 + PB + Mod) or be knocked prone. You can use this bonus action a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.
